auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.
auth.accountDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact your administrator.
auth.emailDeliveryUnavailable: Email service is not configured. Contact your administrator.
auth.verifyEmailRequired: Please verify your email to continue.
auth.verifyEmailSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.verifyEmailSuccess: Email verified. You can sign in now.
auth.verifyEmailInvalid: Verification link is invalid or expired.
auth.passwordResetPrompt: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.resetPasswordPrompt: Enter and confirm your new password.
auth.resetPasswordInvalid: Reset link is invalid or expired.
auth.accountLocked: Account temporarily locked. Try again later.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.

home.title: Ship reliable changes without slowing down
home.subtitle: Sykra turns every commit into an explainable review with configurable rules and quality scoring across repositories.
home.featuresSubtitle: Connect repositories, define rules, and scale AI reviews without losing context.
home.feature1Desc: Every change gets a score, rationale, and category breakdown.
home.feature2Desc: Encode team standards with weighted severity and ownership.
home.feature3Desc: See progress live and drill into issues immediately.
home.feature4Desc: GitHub, GitLab, or generic Git with secure tokens.
home.workflowTitle: A workflow your team can adopt in a day
home.workflowSubtitle: Three steps from connection to continuous quality.
home.step1Desc: Authorize your VCS or use a token-based integration.
home.step2Desc: Blend security, performance, and style checks with weights.
home.step3Desc: Track scores over time and focus on high-impact issues.
home.securitySubtitle: Tokens are encrypted, data is isolated, and nothing leaks to the client.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to scale AI code review?
home.ctaSubtitle: Launch Sykra for your team and start shipping with confidence.

projects.title: Projects
projects.dangerZoneDescription: High-impact actions for this project are grouped here.
projects.deleteProjectWarning: Deleting a project removes its project-scoped configuration and access path from the dashboard. This action cannot be undone.
projects.deleteProjectDialogDescription: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
projects.noProjectsDescription: Add your first project to get started
projects.noProjectsEmptyDescription: Add a GitHub repository to start using code review features
projects.pickRepository: Pick a repository from your GitHub account
projects.aiIntegrationHelp: Bind this project to a specific AI model integration, or use the organization default.
projects.ignorePatternsPlaceholder:
One pattern per line, e.g.:
node_modules/**
*.test.ts
dist/**
projects.ignorePatternsHelp: Use .gitignore style patterns, one per line. Lines starting with # are comments.
projects.qualityThresholdHelp: Warnings will be issued when the score is below this value. Leave blank to not set a threshold.
projects.artifactRetentionDaysHelp: Override artifact retention for this project. Leave empty to use the Conductor default retention policy.
projects.autoAnalyzeHelp: Automatically trigger code review when new commits are detected
projects.webhookHelp: A POST request will be sent to this URL after analysis is complete.
projects.codebaseFileTooLarge: File is too large to preview
projects.codebaseThreadShortcuts: C reply/new · R resolve/reopen · J/K navigate
projects.viewQualityTrends: View quality trends and statistics for {{name}}
projects.alertsDescription: Get alerted for anomalies. Monitor your projects and get notified.

pipelines.title: Pipelines
pipelines.description: Automated CI/CD with configurable DAG jobs
pipelines.emptyDescription: Create your first pipeline to automate code review and deployment
pipelines.deleteDialogDescription: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
pipelines.cancelRunDialogDescription: Cancel {{run}}? Active jobs will stop and the run will be marked as canceled.

basic.name: Pipeline Name
basic.environmentHelp: Execution and deployment context for this pipeline. Used for worker targeting and runtime environment labeling.
basic.buildImagePresetPlaceholder: Choose a managed build image preset
basic.buildImagePresetHelp: Presets are the recommended path for common runtimes. Switch to Custom only when you need a non-standard image.
basic.buildImageHelp: All source, quality gate, and build jobs run inside isolated runner containers created from this image. Choose an official runtime base image that already includes git and any package-manager tooling your repo needs; Conductor does not modify the container at runtime.
basic.autoDetectedHelp: Detected from repository metadata. You can override any value below.
basic.branchHelp: The single source-of-truth branch for this pipeline. Source checkout and push-trigger matching both use this branch.
basic.autoTriggerHelp: Automatically run this pipeline when code is pushed to the source branch
basic.scheduleHelp: Use a preset or enter a UTC cron expression.
basic.mixedTriggerPurposePlaceholder: e.g. Push for commit validation, schedule for nightly drift checks
basic.mixedTriggerPurposeHelp: Required when both auto-trigger and schedule are enabled. Describe why both trigger modes are intentionally used.

schedule.description: Run this pipeline on a recurring UTC schedule.
schedule.cronHelp: Uses minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week format.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.stageBuilderDescription: Define each stage as a controlled execution column. Dependencies are derived from stage order and dispatch mode.
jobs.slotDescription: Optional automation inserted between core stages.
jobs.coreStageDescription: Core delivery stage. Jobs here are part of the main release flow.
jobs.sourceStageDescription: Fixed pipeline entry. This stage always contains exactly one source node.
jobs.automationFixedHint: This slot always enters automatically and runs in parallel.
jobs.stageEmpty: No jobs in this stage yet.
jobs.sourceEmpty: Source node is missing. Restore it to keep the pipeline valid.
jobs.inspectorDescription: Edit the selected job without leaving the stage layout.
jobs.inspectorEmpty: Select a job card to edit its details.
jobs.graphHint: Click a node to edit the corresponding job
jobs.graphLinkHint: Drag from a right anchor to a target node to add dependency. Click an edge to remove dependency.
jobs.graphInvalidSelf: A job cannot depend on itself.
jobs.graphInvalidCycle: This dependency would introduce a cycle.
jobs.executionPreviewCycleWarning: Cycle detected. Fix dependencies before saving.
jobs.name: Job Name
jobs.needsHelp: Select upstream jobs. The current job runs only after all selected jobs succeed.
jobs.addDialogDescription: Select job type and dependencies first. Layer placement is derived from dependencies.
jobs.addDialogNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to use a default name
jobs.addDialogNeedsHelp: Dependency choices determine where this node is placed in the DAG.
jobs.addDialogTargetLayer: This job will be placed in Layer {{layer}}.
jobs.qualityGateDescription: The gate runs AI review first, then static analysis on the same source snapshot.
jobs.qualityGateMinScoreHelp: Build starts only when the AI review score meets this threshold.
jobs.qualityGateAiReviewHelp: Reads the latest completed review score for the current run commit and blocks the pipeline when it falls short.
jobs.qualityGateAiReviewRuntime: This check is fixed and does not run a shell command.
jobs.qualityGateStaticAnalysisHelp: Runs a deterministic command inside the build image after the AI review passes.
jobs.qualityGateStaticAnalysisPresetHelp: Choose a supported preset for a structured report, or switch to Custom to define your own command and artifact path.
jobs.qualityGateStaticAnalysisArtifactPathsHe: One glob or file path per line. Include the report file that Conductor should ingest, such as a SARIF file or Go vet JSON report.
jobs.qualityGateFixedOrder: Fixed order: {{name}} runs first, then static analysis.
jobs.qualityGateFixedOrderFallback: The quality gate always runs AI review first, then static analysis.
jobs.builtinHint: This built-in job type is executed by the Conductor and does not require editable shell steps.
jobs.duplicateIdError: Duplicate job ID detected. Every job must have a unique ID.

source.title: Source
source.description: Code is pulled from the project repository at the configured branch

review.title: Quality Gate
review.description: AI review and static analysis before build
review.qualityGateHelp: Block the pipeline when required quality checks fail
review.minScoreHelp: AI review must meet or exceed this score to continue

build.title: Build
build.noSteps: No build steps. Add a step to get started.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.noSteps: No deploy steps. Add a step to get started.
deploy.rollbackHelp: Allows rolling back to the previous successful deployment

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Get notified when pipeline runs complete

detail.noRuns: No runs yet. Trigger the first run.
detail.nodeDialogDescription: Inspect the selected node without leaving the run history view.
detail.retryDialogDescription: This reruns {{name}} from the first step using the pipeline version snapshot captured when this run was created. {{steps}} step(s) will run again, while upstream successful nodes remain unchanged. To use the latest pipeline config, trigger a new run after saving your changes.
detail.retryVersionTooltip: This retry uses the pipeline version snapshot saved with the selected run. Save your changes and trigger a new run to use the latest pipeline config.
detail.executionSummaryDescription: Critical path and failure root cause for the selected run.
detail.failureSummaryDescription: Surface the first actionable failure so you do not need to inspect every node manually.
detail.stagesDescription: Inspect each stage and open a node for step logs.
detail.releaseStatusPendingHelp: Select artifacts and publish an immutable release to make this run reusable.
detail.recommendedActionManual: Approve the waiting manual node to continue this run. Use this when execution is paused for a manual gate.
detail.recommendedActionRetry: Retry the failed subtree in this same run when the fix does not require a new pipeline version.
detail.recommendedActionNewRun: Trigger a new run after saving changes when you want the latest pipeline version to take effect.
detail.recommendedActionObserve: Let the active run continue unless you need to cancel it or a manual gate is waiting.
detail.runStatsBacklogQueue: This pipeline has active backlog. Prefer queue or cancel previous for shared environments.
detail.runStatsBacklogCancel: Development-style pipelines benefit from cancel previous when new commits arrive quickly.
detail.runStatsLowSuccess: Success rate is low. Strengthen review/build gates before adding more deployment automation.
detail.runStatsRepeatedFailures: Recent failures are elevated. Review version diff and latest failure summary before rerunning.
detail.runStatsHealthy: Run health looks stable over the last 7 days.

versionsTab.title: Versions
versionsTab.description: Review saved pipeline snapshots and compare the current revision with the previous one.
versionsTab.changesDescription: Only the fields that changed between revisions are shown here.
versionsTab.firstVersion: This is the first saved version.
versionsTab.noChanges: No config changes between these versions.

log.title: Logs
log.selectStep: Select a step to view logs

settingsTab.title: Settings
settingsTab.variablesDescription: Plain environment variables injected into every step.
settingsTab.secretsDescription: Write-only values encrypted at rest and injected into every pipeline step.
settingsTab.usageDescription: Use secrets for tokens, private keys, JSON credentials, and any sensitive runtime input.
settingsTab.precedenceHint: Secrets override plain variables and inline job or step environment values with the same key.
settingsTab.reservedPrefixHint: Keys starting with {{prefix}} are reserved for system runtime metadata.
settingsTab.secretKeyHint: Uppercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.
settingsTab.secretValueHint: The value is never returned after save. Paste the full secret exactly as it should be injected.
settingsTab.empty: No secrets yet. Add encrypted runtime credentials for this pipeline.
settingsTab.invalidName: Use uppercase letters, numbers, and underscores, and start with a letter or underscore.
settingsTab.nameTooLong: Key must be 64 characters or fewer.
settingsTab.reservedName: This key is reserved for system pipeline metadata.
settingsTab.valueTooLarge: Value must be at most {{size}} KB.
settingsTab.deleteDialogDescription: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
settingsTab.dangerZoneDescription: High-impact actions for this pipeline are grouped here.
settingsTab.deletePipelineWarning: Deleting a pipeline permanently removes its configuration, run history, and Conductor-owned runtime state. Active runs must be finished or canceled first.
settingsTab.policyRejectionsDescription: Rejected pipeline operations with reason codes for governance and troubleshooting.

pipelines.artifactAuditDescription: Artifact download reliability and latency for this project (pipeline run outcomes are excluded)
pipelines.artifactsEmptyTitle: No artifacts uploaded for this node
pipelines.artifactsEmptyDescription: Build success does not upload outputs automatically. Configure Artifact Paths in the build step (for example: dist/** or .next/**), then rerun.
pipelines.publishArtifactsDescription: Promote selected run outputs into an immutable project artifact version.
pipelines.selectStep: Select a step to view logs

concurrencyMode.label: Concurrency Mode
concurrencyMode.help: Controls what happens when a run is triggered while another is already active.
concurrencyMode.queueHelp: New runs are rejected (409) if another run is already active.
concurrencyMode.cancelPreviousHelp: Active runs are canceled before starting a new one.
concurrencyMode.productionPolicyHelp: Production pipelines must not use Allow mode. Use Queue to keep deployment execution controlled and auditable.

steps.artifactPathsHelp: One glob or file path per line. Matched files are uploaded after the step succeeds.
steps.artifactInputsHelp: Deploy step only. Matched artifacts from earlier steps in the same run are downloaded before executing this step.
steps.deploySourceHelp: Choose whether this deploy step consumes the current run output or a published registry version.
steps.registryRepositoryHelp: Select the immutable repository that stores the release artifact.
steps.registryVersionHelp: Pick an exact immutable version for reproducible deployments.
steps.registryChannelHelp: Pick a deployment channel to follow the latest promoted version.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.description: Immutable build outputs published from pipeline runs and ready for promotion or deployment.
artifacts.emptyDescription: Publish build outputs from a pipeline run to create an immutable version that can be promoted across environments.
artifacts.promoteDescription: Move this immutable version onto a deployment channel.

dashboard.emptyDescription: Connect a repository and run your first AI code review.
dashboard.noProjectScores: No scored reports in the last 14 days
dashboard.noReportsInPeriod: No report data in this period.
dashboard.noPipelineRunsInPeriod: No pipeline runs in this period.

reports.title: Reports
reports.noReportsDescription: Run your first analysis to see reports
reports.terminateConfirmDescription: Terminate this running report? The analysis task will be canceled and marked as failed.
reports.noMatchingReports: No reports match the current filters

rules.title: Rule Sets
rules.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this rule set for?
rules.deleteRuleConfirmDescription: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
rules.promptPlaceholder: Describe what Claude should check for…
rules.noRulesInSetDescription: Add rules to define what Claude should check for

templates.title: Import Template
templates.description: Start from a pre-built rule set template

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.description: Configure delivered email notifications for pipeline runs and analysis reports.
notificationsPage.emailNotificationsDescription: Use a single delivery channel for the notifications that are already implemented in the product.
notificationsPage.notifyPipelineRunDescription: Receive emails when a pipeline run finishes with success, failure, timeout, or cancellation.
notificationsPage.notifyReportReadyDescription: Receive emails when an analysis report is completed or partially completed.
notificationsPage.reportScoreThresholdDescription: Only send report-ready emails when the score is below this threshold. Leave empty to always notify.
notificationsPage.deliveryDevTitle: Email delivery is in development mode
notificationsPage.deliveryDevDescription: The current provider only logs outgoing emails locally. Switch to a live provider before relying on notifications.
notificationsPage.deliveryBrokenTitle: Email delivery is not configured correctly
notificationsPage.deliveryBrokenDescription: The selected provider is missing required credentials. Fix the mail configuration before enabling notifications.

runtimePage.title: Runtime
runtimePage.description: Set analysis limits, timeout behavior, and code preview limits for this workspace.
runtimePage.admissionDescription: Limit analysis throughput and protect the queue from org-level overload.
runtimePage.dedupeDescription: Control identical-request reuse and stale-report auto-failure behavior.
runtimePage.codebaseDescription: Control how much code can be loaded in the browser preview.
runtimePage.pipelineEnvironmentsDescription: Manage selectable pipeline environments with stable key, display label, and explicit order.
runtimePage.pipelineEnvironmentsHint: Use lowercase kebab-case keys and readable labels. Development, Preview, and Production are locked.
runtimePage.pipelineEnvironmentsColumns: Left: key, middle: label, right: ordering actions
runtimePage.pipelineEnvironmentsImmutable: Default environments are locked. You can only reorder them or add custom environments.
runtimePage.hintWindow: Time window used for analyze rate limits.
runtimePage.hintUserProject: Maximum analyze requests in one window for the same user and project.
runtimePage.hintOrg: Maximum analyze requests in one window across the active org.
runtimePage.hintIp: Auxiliary IP-based ceiling to reduce abuse or accidental bursts.
runtimePage.hintProjectActive: Reject new analyze requests when one project already has this many pending/running reports.
runtimePage.hintOrgActive: Reject new analyze requests when the org queue is already saturated.
runtimePage.hintRetryAfter: Retry hint returned to clients when backpressure blocks requests.
runtimePage.hintDedupeTtl: How long an identical analyze request result can be reused.
runtimePage.hintDedupeLock: How long the in-flight dedupe lock is held while a request is being created.
runtimePage.hintReportTimeout: Pending or running reports older than this are auto-marked failed.
runtimePage.hintCodebaseFileMaxBytes: Files larger than this are truncated in the browser preview.

storagePage.title: Artifact Storage
storagePage.description: Choose where pipeline artifacts are stored and retained.
storagePage.providerHelp: Use local storage for quick setup, or connect an S3-compatible object store.
storagePage.secretPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current secret
storagePage.secretKeepHint: Current secret key is stored securely; only enter a value to replace it.

accountPage.title: Account
accountPage.description: Manage your personal profile, linked sign-in methods, sessions, and workspace tokens in one place.
accountPage.profileDescription: Your avatar is resolved automatically. Gravatar wins first, then linked providers such as GitHub or Google, and finally the stored fallback.
accountPage.avatarHelp: Avatar uploads are disabled. The image updates automatically from Gravatar or linked providers when available.
accountPage.noLinkedProvidersDescription: Connect GitHub or another identity provider to improve sign-in and avatar fallback.
accountPage.workspaceTokensDescription: These tokens are scoped to the active workspace, not your personal account.
accountPage.workspaceTokensNotice: API tokens are scoped to the active workspace.
accountPage.connectionsDescription: Link external sign-in providers and reuse their verified avatar when Gravatar is unavailable.
accountPage.githubConnectionDescription: Link GitHub to this account for sign-in and avatar fallback.
accountPage.sessionsEmptyDescription: Sessions will appear here after a successful sign-in.
accountPage.sessionsDescription: Review and revoke current sign-in sessions.
accountPage.apiTokensDescription: Tokens allow programmatic access to Sykra. They are shown once at creation.
accountPage.tokenCreatedHint: Token created. Copy it now because it will not be shown again.
accountPage.tokensEmptyDescription: Create an API token to automate access from scripts or external tools.
accountPage.revokeSessionDialogDescription: This action signs out the selected session immediately.

organizationsPage.title: Organizations
organizationsPage.createDialogDescription: Organizations group projects and collaborators under a shared workspace.
organizationsPage.noOrganizationsDescription: Create a workspace to group projects and collaborators.
organizationsPage.noMembersDescription: Add members to the active workspace or switch to another organization.
organizationsPage.invitePermissionHint: Only owners or admins can send invites.
organizationsPage.noInvitesDescription: Invite teammates to this workspace to collaborate.

integrationsPage.title: Integrations
integrationsPage.description: Manage your code repository and AI model integrations
integrationsPage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this integration?
integrationsPage.deleteSuccessRebindHint: Integration deleted. Projects that used it may need to rebind an AI model in Project Settings.
integrationsPage.deleteDialogDescription: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
integrationsPage.repositoriesDescription: Connect to GitHub, GitLab, or other Git services
integrationsPage.noRepositories: No repository integrations configured. Add one to get started.
integrationsPage.repositoriesEmptyDescription: Connect a repository provider to start syncing codebases.
integrationsPage.aiModelsDescription: Connect your preferred AI providers for code analysis.
integrationsPage.noAiModels: No AI integrations configured. Add one to enable code analysis.
integrationsPage.aiModelsEmptyDescription: Add an AI model to enable review and analysis workflows.

commits.title: Commits
commits.author: Author
commits.configureRuleSetFirst: Please configure a rule set for this project first
commits.aiIntegrationRebindRequired: The bound AI model is unavailable. Rebind an AI model in Project Settings.
commits.compareInvalid: Base and target must be different
commits.binaryFileNotice: Binary file diff is not available
commits.selectFileToView: Select a file from the left list to view split diff
commits.noParsedFiles: Diff content exists but no file blocks were parsed
commits.syntaxDisabled: Syntax highlight paused for large files
commits.normalizedViewHint: Diff view is normalized for comparison.
commits.commentsDisabledCompare: Comments are available only on commit diffs
commits.confirmReviewMessage: Will review {{count}} commits using rule set "{{ruleSet}}"
commits.analysisNote: The AI reviewer will analyze the selected commits using your configured rules. This may take a minute or two.

reportDetail.title: Report Detail
reportDetail.analyzing: AI is performing in-depth analysis of your code...
reportDetail.analyzingSubtext: Performing multi-dimensional quality analysis, security scanning, performance evaluation...
reportDetail.noMatchingIssues: No issues match the current filters
reportDetail.aiChatEmptyTitle: Chat with the AI code reviewer
reportDetail.aiChatEmptyDescription: Ask about code issues, request deeper explanations, discuss best practices, or get fix suggestions.
reportDetail.aiChatMultiLineHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
reportDetail.aiChatPromptDescription: One click to generate and copy a reusable prompt for your local coding assistant.
reportDetail.aiChatPromptPlaceholder: Click "Generate & Copy Prompt" to create a reusable local AI prompt.
reportDetail.aiChatQuickPromptPatch: Please generate a minimal fix patch with exact code changes and explain trade-offs.
reportDetail.aiChatQuickPromptTests: Please propose focused test cases (unit/integration/e2e), including edge cases and expected assertions.
reportDetail.aiChatQuickPromptRegression: Please provide a regression risk checklist and a concise verification plan for release readiness.
reportDetail.aiChatPromptTaskInstruction: Act as a senior software engineer and provide an executable fix plan for the issue below.
reportDetail.aiChatPromptOutput1: Root cause analysis (with assumptions clearly marked).
reportDetail.aiChatPromptOutput2: Minimal safe patch (exact files and code changes).
reportDetail.aiChatPromptConstraint2: Preserve existing behavior unless explicitly fixing a bug.
reportDetail.aiChatPromptConstraint3: If uncertain, list the uncertainty before proposing changes.
reportDetail.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to discuss this issue.
